feature: Meal Swap fixes round 2 — width alignment and English enforcement

prompts.description: Match swap sheet width exactly to meal card width
prompts.prompt: The MealSwapSheet bottom sheet in components/meal-swap-sheet.tsx is wider than the meal cards in daily-view.tsx. Fix this by: 1) First, read components/daily-view.tsx and find the exact wrapper/container element that sets the max-width for meal cards. 2) Apply the exact same max-width, padding, and margin values to the Sheet content wrapper in meal-swap-sheet.tsx. Do NOT guess — copy the exact Tailwind classes from daily-view's card container. 3) The swap sheet content should visually align perfectly with the meal cards above it. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.

prompts.description: Force English meal names in swap API response
prompts.prompt: Meal names from the swap API are still appearing in Korean even when the app is set to English. In app/api/swap-meal/route.ts: 1) Find the prompt string sent to Claude AI. 2) Add an explicit instruction at the TOP of the prompt: 'IMPORTANT: All meal names, ingredient names, and recipe instructions MUST be in English. Do NOT use Korean or any other language unless explicitly requested.' 3) Also check if the userProfile.language field is being read. If it exists and equals 'ko', then use Korean. For ALL other cases (including undefined, null, or 'en'), enforce English. 4) Double check that the response parsing does not have any hardcoded Korean text. Follow CLAUDE.md guidelines.
